message:
fix(vdbe): use sort_done label in SorterSort jump target for JOIN ORDER BY

SorterSort in codegen_join_select was emitted with p2=0, so when the
sorter is empty (no matching rows) it would jump to instruction 0 (the
Init opcode), causing an infinite loop or program restart.  Use
emit_jump_to_label with the already-allocated sort_done label, matching
the correct pattern used in the other two SorterSort call sites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
